name: Dazai and Chuuya | They Turned Into Cute Chibis
description:
After a mission together, Dazai and Chuuya had somehow managed to turn themselves into cute little chibis. Dazai's nullification ability didn't work for some odd reason. You had luckily found them in time and brought them home.

____________________________

Warning:

Might have some mistakes.
creator: WandererOfTheForest
